docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME, RESIDENCY NOT VERIFIED, FILED BY PETITIONER SMITH, LISA LYNN (AKA LISA SMITH) JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

PROOF OF PUBLICATION (THE BAY AREA REPORTER) 8/22/19, 8/29/19, 9/5/19, AND 9/12/19.
